qa_matrix.question_text: Kindly confirm your full Name
Your Date of birth
Education Qualification
Your current Occupation
Please show your ID proof
Kindly share your current location( City and state with country)?
In the last 24 months, have you smoked or used any tobacco or nicotine products?
Do you consume alcohol ?
Have you ever been advised by a doctor to reduce or stop alcohol consumption ?
Have you ever used recreational drugs or Narcotics that was not prescribed by a Licensed physician ?
qa_matrix.captured_response: No, I have never taken anything like that.

qa_matrix.question_text: What is Proposed insured height (cm)?
What is Proposed Insured weight (kg)?
High/Low blood pressure, raised cholesterol or triglycerides or lipids

Chest pain or heaviness or discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, coronary artery disease, Heart valve disorder, congenital heart disease, palpitation, rheumatic fever, shortness of breath or any other heart conditions
Cancer or carcinoma-in-situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukaemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sacroma, tumours, polyps, nodules, cysts, lump or other growths

typo_in_expected_response.corrected_text: Cancer or carcinoma-in-situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukaemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumours, polyps, nodules, cysts, lump or other growths

qa_matrix.question_text: Diabetes, raised blood sugar or sugar in urine,Hyperthyroidism, Hypothyroidism , other thyroid disorders, or any other endocrine disorders
Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, chronic or recurrent cough, sleep apnea, emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease (COPD) or any other respiratory disorders
Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease or any other diseases or disorders of the liver
Anemia, thalassemia, systemic lupus erythematosus or any other diseases or disorders of the blood or autoimmune disease

Anxiety, depression, epilepsy, paralysis, weakness of limb, stroke, transient ischemic attack (TIA), multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, Dementia, Alzheimer's or any other neurological, nervous, mental health disorders?

Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcera-tive colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders

typo_in_expected_response.corrected_text: Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders

qa_matrix.question_text: Kidney stones, gall stones, kidney or urinary tract infection, blood or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula, hydrocele or any other disorders of the kidney, bladder, genital, prostate or urinary systems?
Recurrent Back pain, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular dystrophies, deformity, physical disability or any other disorders of muscle, bones, joints, limbs or spine?
Blindness,cataracts, glaucoma, impaired sight, double vision or any other diseases or disorders of eyes
Deafness, Impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficult in swal-lowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ears, nose or throat

typo_in_expected_response.corrected_text: Deafness, Impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficult in swallowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ears, nose or throat

qa_matrix.question_text: Is there anything else that you would like to share with us with respect to your health/ habits or anything else that you believe is important to ensure that policy is processed basis all facts & information?

Other than what you have already told us, have you had a medical condition that has required any of the following within the last 5 years a)Any abnormal medical findings or pending test results, scheduled or planned or pre-scribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endo-scopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test

typo_in_expected_response.corrected_text: Other than what you have already told us, have you had a medical condition that has required any of the following within the last 5 years a)Any abnormal medical findings or pending test results, scheduled or planned or prescribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endoscopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test

qa_matrix.question_text: Medication or treatment that lasted more than 2 weeks or had been referred to a specialist doctor or hospital for any treatment/consultation and/or investigations (eg: Blood, ECG, MRI, Xray etc)
Inability to perform your daily activities or absent from work more than two 2 consec-utive weeks at a time

typo_in_expected_response.corrected_text: Inability to perform your daily activities or absent from work more than two 2 consecutive weeks at a time

qa_matrix.question_text: Have you suffered from any congenital defect or disorder or hereditary disease such as cerebral palsy, Down's syndrome, poliomyelitis
Have you or your spouse or partner been told to undergo tests or treatment, or received any medical advice or counselling in connection with sexually transmitted diseases, including HIV and AIDS?

Apart from what you have disclosed, are you experiencing any unexplained weight loss/gain or any sign/symptoms that you are likely to seek medical advice or treatment for or awaiting any surgical procedure.
Are you Pregnant now?
Have you ever suffered/are currently suffering from gestational diabetes, preeclampsia or any other pregnancy related complications?
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor should have asked about gestational diabetes, preeclampsia, or other pregnancy-related complications.

qa_matrix.question_text: Have you ever suffered from or consulted a doctor for breast lump(s), breast disease, irregular or painful menstruation, abnormal Pap Smear or any other breasts or gyneco-logical conditions such as vaginal disorders, or disorder of the uterus, ovary, fallopian tubes ?

typo_in_expected_response.corrected_text: Have you ever suffered from or consulted a doctor for breast lump(s), breast disease, irregular or painful menstruation, abnormal Pap Smear or any other breasts or gynecological conditions such as vaginal disorders, or disorder of the uterus, ovary, fallopian tubes ?

qa_matrix.question_text: You Ankita Kailas Marne , declare that, you have fully understood the questions asked to you as per this call and have furnished complete, true and accurate information after fully understanding the same. Sir/Mam' are you in agreement with the declaration that I have read out to you.
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor should read the full declaration as per the MER and then ask for agreement.

critical_issues: Discrepancy in the insurance company name stated by the doctor during the disclaimer ("Tata AIG Insurance") versus the official name in the MER ("Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Ltd.").
The doctor failed to read the full declaration as specified in the MER document at the end of the call.
A mandatory question regarding pregnancy-related complications (gestational diabetes, preeclampsia, etc.) was missing from the conversation.
recommendations: The doctor should ensure the correct and official insurance company name is stated during the disclaimer.
The doctor must read the complete declaration verbatim as provided in the MER to ensure full legal compliance.
All mandatory questions from the MER, including those related to pregnancy complications, must be asked to the customer.

customer_satisfaction_indicators: Customer is cooperative and answers all questions.

meta.insurance_company: Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Ltd.
